On 10 December 2022, thousands of BNP members staged a mass protest at Golapbagh playground, Dhaka city, demanding resignation of the AL government and calling for fresh elections under the care-taker setup. Thousands of police personnel were deployed in the city.

assoc_actor_1: AL: Bangladesh Awami League; BCL: Bangladesh Chhatra League; Students (Bangladesh)
notes: On 10 December 2022, members of Awami League and Chhatra League (BCL) staged protests at multiple places in Dhaka city, ahead of mass demonstrations of BNP, claiming that BNP is spreading propaganda in the country.

On 10 December 2022, members of Awami League and BNP staged counter demonstrations in Mugda area, Dhaka city, against each other. BNP members staged a demonstration joining the divisional rally whereas Awami League members staged demonstration against BNP demonstrations. Members of both parties clashed with brickbats during the demonstrations. A Jubo League leader was injured while two motorcycles were vandalized during the clash.
